name: Kingdom of AMELL(A MONARCHY IN A DEMOCRATIC WORLD)
description:
You play as a king in a world ruled by democracies. They have tolerated for years and you have navigated through trade and treaties but it no longer seems to be viable or is it still viable? It is for you to navigate.

Message 1- War is already at your door step.

Message 2- War seem evident but can be avoided
creator: janitorre
